properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've heard it said today is all we're given Tomorrow may not come so you better start living I guess it all depends on your point of view, yeah yeah

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Well, pardon me if I, I just don't listen To everything the world says I'm missing There's nothing here and now I'm gonna hold on to, hold on to

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Now I'm living in the days ahead I'm already dancing on the streets of gold And I can't stop celebrating in my soul 'Cause I'm, I'm living in the days ahead Nothing on earth could ever compare I can't wait for the day that I get there

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When I see Jesus face to face Tell me what could be better Tell me what could be better, oh yeah yeah

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: If home is where the heart is, then I'm in Heaven It's the promise of tomorrow that I've been given And who is waiting there I am living for, yeah yeah

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: He's everything I love and I believe in And I can hardly wait just to see Him And hear Him say, Well done, I couldn't ask for more

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: I'm singing now I'm living in the days ahead I'm already dancing on the streets of gold And I can't stop celebrating in my soul 'Cause I'm, I'm living in the days ahead Nothing on earth could ever compare I can't wait for the day that I get there

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: When I see Jesus face to face Tell me what could be better What could be better, yeah

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Well, life is full of ups and downs Inside outs, round and rounds You can't blame me for dreaming about it, yeah yeah

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Now I'm, I'm living in the days ahead I'm already dancing on the streets of gold And I can't stop celebrating in my soul 'Cause I'm, I'm living in the days ahead Nothing on earth could ever compare I can't wait for the day that I get there

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: When I see Jesus face to face Yeah, when I see Jesus face to face What could be better, yeah yeah yeah yeah

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: What could be better What could be better What could be, what could be better What could be better
